rules.description: App Launcher: right_command+S then a letter to launch a creative/software app
App Launcher: right_command+A then a letter to launch a lighter app
App Launcher: right_command+W then a letter to launch a work app (macguff.eu Chrome profile)
App Launcher: right_command+P then a letter to launch a personal app (bdelonglee@gmail.com Chrome profile)
Shortcuts mode: right_command+/ then a letter to open a cheat sheet page
